title: Object-Oriented Programming
description: Learn the fundamentals of object-oriented programming in C++ including classes, objects, inheritance, and polymorphism.
learningObjectives: Create and use constructors and destructors

subtopics.title: Classes and Objects
Constructors and Destructors
Encapsulation and Access Modifiers
Inheritance
Polymorphism
STL (Standard Template Library)
File Handling

glossary.definition: A user-defined data type that serves as a blueprint for creating objects.
An instance of a class with its own state and behavior.
A special member function that initializes objects of a class.
A special member function that cleans up when an object is destroyed.
Bundling data and methods that operate on the data within a class.
Creating new classes from existing classes, inheriting their properties and methods.
The ability of different classes to respond to the same method call differently.
A member function that can be overridden in derived classes.
